executive_summary: Across 3 persona groups, the signup flow converts moderately well. The landing page's dual-CTA pattern creates measurable hesitation. Power users completed quickly, while lower-savviness users got stuck choosing between signup and login.

cluster_findings.summary: High completion rate and low friction. Users moved through the flow decisively.
Completed but hesitated on the landing page.
Completed with the longest time on screen.

top_friction_points: Landing page CTA ambiguity on s1

onboarding: Two primary CTAs compete for attention on the landing page.

recommended_next_tests: Test the landing page with a single primary CTA vs. the current dual-CTA variant.
Retest with lower-tech-savviness personas after clarifying the login/signup distinction.
